attr.title: Impostor Factory
attr.desc: A bonkers time-loop tragicomedy murder mystery thriller featuring multiple casualties and a suspicious cat, from the creator of To the Moon & Finding Paradise.
attr.inst: Copy the entire contents of your Steam install (`steamapps/common/Impostor Factory/Impostor Factory/`) into the `impostorfactory` folder. Required files: Game.rgssad, Game.ini, Audio/, Fonts/, preload/.
